scenes.description: A Japanese high-school rooftop at sunset, cherry blossoms flying in the wind. The Hero and Heroine stand close, silence filled with emotions.

dialogue.text: Tumse milne ke baad lagta hai zindagi ki daud thodi halki ho gayi hai.
Aur tumhari har baat mere dil mein goonj jaati hai.

scenes.description: Close-up of Heroine’s face as she smiles nervously. A shadow appears behind them — a tall figure watching from the distance.

dialogue.text: Kya tumne mehsoos kiya? Jaise koi hume dekh raha ho?

scenes.description: The Mysterious Stranger steps forward, his face hidden in the dark. Japanese lanterns flicker in the background by the riverbank.

dialogue.text: Tum dono ki kahaani mein ek raaz chhupa hai… jo abhi khulne wala hai.

scenes.description: The Hero protects the Heroine, standing firmly. The Stranger reveals an old locket glowing in the moonlight.

dialogue.text: Tum kaun ho? Aur yeh humari zindagi mein kyon aaya ho?
Sach yeh hai… tumhari taqdeer hum teenon ko jodti hai.

scenes.description: A flashback sequence appears — cherry blossoms turn red like blood, Hero’s childhood memory of losing someone plays out.

dialogue.text: Yeh locket… yeh toh meri maa ka tha…

scenes.description: The Stranger places the locket in Hero’s hand. Heroine holds Hero’s arm, assuring him with her presence.

dialogue.text: Jo bhi sach ho… main tumhare saath hoon.

scenes.description: Final fireworks above a Japanese castle. The three stand together — Hero and Heroine closer, Stranger looking at the sky.

dialogue.text: Hamari kahaani abhi shuru hui hai.
Aur is dafa hum apni kismat khud likhenge.
Phir dekhte hain… kahaani kahan tak jaati hai.
